positive: A stylized celestial fox spirit, depicted with graceful lines and luminous fur, standing among stylized cosmic flora and nebula clouds. The fox has an ethereal silhouette, with striking magenta, cyan, and gold accents defining its form. Compositionally centered, with dynamic elements sweeping around the central figure. Use a deep indigo and royal purple palette against bright, contrasting glows. Flat graphic style, high contrast, line-art quality mixed with subtle watercolor washes, vector art feel, suitable for textile printing.
